sources.rationale: Visibility, share of voice, sentiment, and position come from Peec MCP.
Topic-level metrics and IDs are from the MCP-verified BMW project.
Model-level visibility split is from Peec brand reports.
Gap domains and citation/retrieval values are from Peec domain reports.
Step 2 labels are provisional scope-locked classifications awaiting enrichment.
Funnel counts are derived from the docs-grounded ingestion seed.
